name: I-Epinephrine (Adrenaline)
description: I-Endogenous catecholamine enomsebenzi we-alpha ne-beta adrenergic. Ukwelashwa komugqa wokuqala we-anaphylaxis nokuboshwa kwenhliziyo. Ku-anaphylaxis, ithanga le-IM liyakhethwa kune-IV (ukusebenza okuphephile, okulinganayo). Ungalibali ukufinyelela kwe-IV ku-anaphylaxis.
dose: I-Anaphylaxis: 0.3-0.5 mg IM (ithanga le-anterolateral) | I-Auto-injector 0.3 mg IM. Phinda u-q5-15 amaminithi we-PRN. Ukuboshwa kwenhliziyo: 1 mg IV/IO q3-5 min ngesikhathi se-CPR. I-bronchospasm enzima: 0.3 mg IM.
window: Ku-anaphylaxis: nikeza i-IM ngokushesha -- ungalibali ukuze uthole ukufinyelela kwe-IV.
contraindications: Akukho contraindications ngokuphelele ezimweni eziphuthumayo ezisongela ukuphila
warnings: I-IV epinephrine ye-anaphylaxis kufanele isetshenziswe kuphela ekuboshweni kwenhliziyo noma ukushaqeka okujulile -- kuyingozi uma inikezwa i-IV push esigulini esiyaziyo.
Ukwengeza kubangela i-tissue necrosis -- qinisekisa i-IV patency.
Khulisa isidingo somoya-mpilo we-myocardial -- sebenzisa ukuqapha esikhungweni senhliziyo esaziwayo ngaphandle kokuboshwa.

pediatric.dose: I-Anaphylaxis: 0.01 mg/kg IM (ubukhulu obungu-0.5 mg). I-EpiPen Jr (0.15 mg) ye-15-30 kg. Ukuboshwa kwenhliziyo: 0.01 mg/kg IV/IO q3-5 min.
pediatric.note: Sebenzisa umthamo osekelwe esisindweni. Ireferensi yetheyiphu ye-Browselow iyanconywa.

obstetric.note: Sebenzisa umthamo ojwayelekile we-anaphylaxis -- ukusinda komama kubalulekile. I-epinephrine iphephile ekukhulelweni ezimweni eziphuthumayo ezisongela ukuphila.
